prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约4458→4389→4199→5003→4510，整体呈波动走势，2024年明显后移至5003名后2025年回弹至4510名，近5年均值约4512名；2025 年基准位次约4510名；该校在云南理科/物理类招生计划2021年74人、2022年86人、2023年82人、2024年93人、2025年100人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026年计 划89人，较2025年缩招11%，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第31名，近年稳定在29–32名区间，属于国内顶尖高 校梯队；2026年声誉监测中湖南大学无显著负面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第16位（高热），短视频曝光量高，反映报考关注度持续升温；历史投档异常记录中 未见湖南大学断档信号；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共8个：化学A、机械工程A、工商管理A、土木工程A-、计算机科学与技术A-、电气工程A-、控制科学与工程A- 、应用经济学A-，工科与管理学科实力均衡，与当前高热专业（计算机、电子信息、电气）高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化 均为2026年高热推荐专业，与湖南大学优势学科高度契合，增强报考吸引力；云南省2026年普通高考考生总数约37.79万人，较2025年（约28.57万人）大幅增加约32%，竞争显著 加剧；湖南大学位于湖南省长沙市，非云南本省高校；在云南招生占比约2.2%（2025年），属跨省招生，无本省倾斜效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4510名、2026年缩招11%（供需弹性主值约4212名）、云南省考生总数大幅增加约32%及抖音高热带来的竞争升温，预计最低录取位次较供 需弹性主值小幅上移；预测最低位次约4312名，区间3812–4812名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 4458 → 4389 → 4199 → 5003 → 4510, showing an overall fluctuating trend. In 2024, there was a significant drop to 5003, but in 2025 it rebounded to 4510. The average over the past 5 years is about 4512. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4510. The enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan's science/physics category was 74 in 2021, 86 in 2022, 82 in 2023, 93 in 2024, and 100 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 89, an 11% reduction compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 31st, and has been stable in the 29–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. In the 2026 reputation monitoring, Hunan University has no significant negative public opinion events. It ranks 16th in overall Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting increasing attention from applicants. There is no signal of a cutoff anomaly in historical admission records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 8 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, and Applied Economics A-. Engineering and management disciplines are balanced, highly matching current hot majors (computer science, electronic information, electrical engineering).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended hot majors for 2026, highly aligned with Hunan University's advantageous disciplines, enhancing admission appeal. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Yunnan Province in 2026 is approximately 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 285,700), intensifying competition. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, not a local university in Yunnan. Its enrollment proportion in Yunnan is about 2.2% (2025), which is cross-provincial enrollment with no local preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4510, the 11% enrollment reduction in 2026 (supply-demand elasticity main value approximately 4212), the significant 32% increase in the total number of candidates in Yunnan Province, and the intensified competition due to high Douyin popularity, the minimum admission ranking is expected to slightly increase compared to the supply-demand elasticity main value. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4312, with a range of 3812–4812.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3812–4812, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<3812), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>4812), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 advantageous disciplines (Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A), while also considering Tier 2 basic disciplines such as Mathematics and Statistics.

学校层次与声誉.text: In the 2026 reputation monitoring, Hunan University had no significant negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity ranked 16th overall (high heat), with increasing application attention; no gap signals were seen in historical admission anomaly records for Hunan University; advantageous disciplines in liberal arts include Business Administration (A), Applied Economics (A-), providing strong support for economics and management enrollment; liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature, though without direct A-level discipline evaluations, benefit from the university's strong overall strength; it is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranked 31st, stable in the 29–32 range in recent years.

专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, Law is assessed as divergent and wait-and-see, while Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, with liberal arts majors having moderate to high popularity; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Yunnan Province in 2026 is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, not a local university in Yunnan; its enrollment proportion in Yunnan is about 2.2% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 984, the significant 140% enrollment expansion in 2026 (supply-demand elasticity main value of about 1811), the substantial 32% increase in the number of examinees in Yunnan Province, and the intensified competition due to high Douyin popularity, the expansion effect is the most important factor; the minimum admission ranking is expected to shift slightly downward from the supply-demand elasticity main value; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1761, with a range of 1497–2025.
